title: Ericoides tenuifolium
taxonomy: Ericoides tenuifolium is classified as a genus and species within the family Gentianaceae. This family is commonly known as the gentian or gentian family, which consists of flowering plants. Ericoides tenuifolium belongs to the order Gentianales, which is a group of flowering plants. The order Gentianales is part of the larger clade of asterids, a group of flowering plants. The classification is based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and molecular characteristics.
